series_metadata.series_description: This is a computer printout which accompanies warrants issued by the Auditor of State reflecting the name of payee, amount of warrant, date issued and warrant number. This information is entered on to the respective voucher before sending the warrant for payment.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Current year plus 3 years past retained in the department. Four years past and older sent to the State Records Center for retenton for 4 years. Then destroy (or until audited), Paper: Wastepaper
